zh.St Clair, Argyllshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Errick Mac Donnchadh of Carrick於1201年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特時，她的父親Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick27歲，母親Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick23歲。她和Sir Archibald Campbell of Lochawe至少有1個女兒。她去世於1280年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍享年79歲。

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Errick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Derek
meanings: From a Low German or Dutch form of Theodoric ( see Terry ), introduced into Britain during the Middle Ages by Flemish weavers, although it was not much used until a sudden explosion of popularity in the mid 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Errick Mac Donnchadh of Carrick was born in 1201, in Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick, was 27 and her mother, Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick, was 23. She had at least 1 daughter with Sir Archibald Campbell of Lochawe. She died in 1280, in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Errick Mac Donnchadh of Carrick est née en 1201, à Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Sir Archibald Campbell of Lochawe. Elle est décédée en 1280, à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Errick Mac Donnchadh of Carrick 1201 in Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick 27 und ihre Mutter Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick 23. Sie hatte mit Sir Archibald Campbell of Lochawe mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1280 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland.

ko.lifeSummary: Errick Mac Donnchadh of Carrick(이)가 1201년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Sir Archibald Campbell of Lochawe(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1280년 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아w에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Errick Mac Donnchadh of Carrick родилась в 1201 г. в местности аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Donnchadh Mac Gilbert 1st Earl of Carrick было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Avelina FitzAlan Countess of Carrick, 23. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Sir Archibald Campbell of Lochawe. Она умерла в 1280 г. в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 79 лет.
